name: HEVN, inc
long_description:
HEVN is API primitives for global payments. Companies use our API to build internal tools for paying contractors in 100+ countries, replacing Deel and Rippling with custom workflows tailored to their business.

The opportunity is that AI codegen made internal tools cheap to build. A company that used to pay $50 per contract in huge SaaS can now build their own version in days, if they have the financial primitives. We provide those primitives.

Team previously built HOT Labs - 15M users, $100M TVL, #1 crypto app on DappRadar for 8 months. Operated companies across SF, UAE, BVI, and HK, and felt all the pain of global payments automation ourselves.
